Home › Orange County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Orange County

The following 86 restaurants in Orange County received a health grade of D or F at their most recent inspection, according to Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) public inspection records. Each listing shows its grade, score, and violation counts, ordered from the lowest score.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • S F 5
    SHARON'S HOMESTYLE COOKIN

    American 4.6★ (922)

    Orlando · Orange County

    Healthy

    Violations: 9 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 10 basic

  • M F 15
    MING'S BISTRO

    Chinese 4.1★ (1114)

    Orlando · Orange County
